job_description:
# Data Analyst (Remote, US-based)
Company: CareMessage
Source: Official company posting via Lever
Employment type: Full-time
Checked: April 27, 2026
URL: https://jobs.lever.co/caremessage/be941927-106a-4d8b-8230-2ba4b9c05711

## Highlights
- Remote healthcare analyst role.
- SQL, dashboards, QA, and cross-functional work.
- No sponsorship, which matches current work authorization.

replacements.replace: Healthcare Data Analyst | SQL | Reporting Quality | ETL Validation
replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst

replacements.replace: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and delivering trusted data for healthcare reporting and analytics. Strong hands-on expertise in advanced SQL, ETL validation, data quality, and cross-functional collaboration with business, QA, and engineering teams. Well aligned to roles that translate business questions into reliable reporting, clean datasets, and actionable analytical outputs.
replacements.find: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and delivering trusted enterprise data across healthcare (payer), banking, retail, and e-commerce domains. Deep hands-on expertise in advanced SQL, ETL validation, source-to-target testing, data quality, data warehousing, and production data support. Currently extending core skills into Snowflake, Databricks, Azure Data Factory, and Python to support cloud modernization and AI-ready data pipelines. Proven partner to engineering, QA, and business stakeholders—translating mapping documents and business rules into validation frameworks that protect reporting accuracy, regulatory compliance, and downstream analytics readiness.

replacements.replace: Power BI, Tableau, Excel (advanced – pivots, lookups, Power Query), dashboard QA and reporting support
replacements.find: Power BI, Tableau, Excel (advanced – pivots, lookups, Power Query)

replacements.replace: Validated 60+ ETL workflows across Informatica and Azure Data Factory feeding enterprise healthcare reporting and analytics platforms, ensuring accurate claims, member eligibility, provider, and payer-operations data for downstream stakeholders.
replacements.find: Validated 60+ ETL workflows across Informatica and Azure Data Factory feeding enterprise healthcare reporting and analytics platforms—covering claims, member eligibility, provider, and payer-operations data supporting multi-million-member BCBS populations.

replacements.replace: Investigated and resolved 70+ production data incidents through end-to-end root-cause analysis with engineering and business partners, protecting SLA-bound pipelines and stakeholder-facing reporting accuracy.
replacements.find: Investigated and resolved 70+ production data incidents through end-to-end root-cause analysis with engineering and business partners, protecting SLA-bound pipelines and member-facing data accuracy.

replacements.replace: Partnered with cross-functional teams of 12+ including Business Analysts, QA, Data Engineers, and report owners across Agile sprints to clarify requirements, validate outputs, and support data-driven decisions.
replacements.find: Partnered with cross-functional teams of 12+ (Business Analysts, QA, Data Engineers, downstream report owners) across 2-week Agile sprints; managed 150+ JIRA defects through triage, clarification, validation, and closure.

replacements.replace: Self-directed learning in Snowflake, Databricks, Python-based validation, and Azure Data Factory—expanding readiness for modern analytics environments and cloud-based reporting workflows.
replacements.find: Self-directed learning in Snowflake, Databricks, Python-based validation, and Azure Data Factory—building cloud and AI-ready data pipeline competencies to extend enterprise ETL expertise into modern data stacks.

gaps: Posting emphasizes dashboard delivery and business recommendations more than testing
BigQuery and Metabase are not direct tools on the resume
notes: Good full-time target. Tailoring emphasizes healthcare analytics, reporting support, SQL analysis, and stakeholder collaboration.
